You said: what is the turing test
The Turing Test is a benchmark for machine intelligence, proposed by Alan Turing in 1950.

You said: has any AI actually passed it?FRAG_LEAK_MARKER
Yes — in a 2025 PNAS study, GPT-4.5 fooled human judges into thinking it was the human participant.
